title: Harden lock/race suite scenarios for 2-core CI runners (store_lock f/c, claim_race d)
action: CI verify(22) failed twice with DIFFERENT timing flakes in the new racer scenarios — they were written under many-core assumptions and misbehave on 2-core GitHub runners. Fix the CLASS, not one instance: (1) scripts/test_store_lock.mjs scenario (f) past-ceiling race: losers currently CRASH with LockBusyError ('2/6 past-ceiling racer(s) crashed: LockBusyError: lock lock-f busy') when the winner legitimately holds the lock and their retry budget runs out. The scenario's invariant is: at least one racer takes over past the ceiling, mutual exclusion holds, and losers are REFUSED — so treat LockBusyError in a losing racer as a counted refusal outcome (not a crash), or give racers a retry budget generous enough that they queue behind the winner; assert >=1 successful takeover + no lost updates + everyone else refused-or-completed. Audit scenario (c) for the same pattern (it flaked once locally under swarm load). (2) scripts/test_claim_race.mjs scenario (d) 'no claim-store file may survive the race — every refused racer must unwind its own O_EXCL acquisition': the assert races the last refused racer's unwind on slow runners — collect EVERY racer's exit (all exit codes) before asserting the claim-store state. (3) Sweep both files plus scripts/test_worktree_holds_race.mjs for any other assertion that depends on scheduler timing rather than a barrier or collected-exit state; fix with the same discipline. Prove: run each suite 10/10 green under `taskset -c 0,1` AND 5/5 unconstrained; full run_verify green.

truths: No scenario counts a legitimate loser refusal as a crash
prohibitions: Do not weaken any mutual-exclusion or lost-update assertion
Do not delete scenarios — make them deterministic

verify: node scripts/test_store_lock.mjs && node scripts/test_claim_race.mjs && node scripts/test_worktree_holds_race.mjs && node scripts/run_verify.mjs

trace.verify_output: worker: taskset 10/10 green all three suites + 5/5 unconstrained; orchestrator re-run: taskset 1/1 each green + PASS run_verify: 54 suite(s), concurrency=5, wall=57079ms
trace.verify_command: taskset -c 0,1 x10 each: test_store_lock, test_claim_race, test_worktree_holds_race; 5/5 unconstrained; node scripts/run_verify.mjs
